popup.title: AudioProctor
popup.hint: Enter the code your teacher gave you.

errors.invalidCode: Enter a valid code (e.g. ABC-123 or AB12).
errors.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection.
errors.sessionError: Assessment not found or has expired. Check with your teacher.

player.title: Assessment
player.exitWordIncorrect: Incorrect exit word. Ask your teacher.
player.exitHint: Ask your teacher for the exit word, then type it below.

tts.instructions: Use the controls above, or press Space to play/pause and ↑ ↓ arrows to navigate paragraphs.
tts.noParagraphs: No paragraphs found in this assessment.

errors.noSession: Session expired or not found. Please re-enter your code using the extension icon.
errors.fetchFailed: Could not load assessment. Check your connection.
errors.invalidSource: Invalid audio source. Please re-enter your code.
errors.audioError: Audio could not be played: {message}. Ask your teacher to restart.
errors.playbackBlocked: Playback blocked: {message}. Try clicking Play again.
errors.loadTimeout: Audio is taking too long to load. Please try again.
errors.textError: Text could not be displayed. Ask your teacher for help.
